title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.760 - Patients to have same rights as those for residents of nursing homes
text:
630.760.  Patients to have same rights as those for residents of nursing homes. — In addition to rights provided for patients, residents or clients of residential facilities licensed by the department under this chapter, residents or clients in facilities and programs licensed by the department shall have the same rights as residents as defined in chapter 198 have under section 198.088.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724)
